cells.rationale: Contract-shaped new claim envelope, synthetic-event fold columns that must preserve re-fold determinism, plus a subtle liveness/exclusion-lock correctness invariant (a claim honored without liveness verification wedges recover forever) — a nameable correctness-critical intelligence-bound reason gating opus at the contract-touching xhigh band.

Architectural inversion removing provision pre-merges with a subtle half-assembled-base invariant (an incomplete fan-in must never present as assembled to finalize) and a byte-equivalence constraint on the no-incident path — correctness-critical cross-cutting change warranting opus at xhigh.

Explicitly the highest-interlock seam in the codebase — a lease/fencing-token concurrency protocol with a tri-state gate, dead-holder recovery, and every legacy finalize discriminant that must be enumerated and reproduced onto the split; a hard opus correctness gate at the reserved max ceiling.

A level-triggered router whose bypass predicate is a sharp subtle-correctness edge (too broad re-fires failed keys into loops, too narrow starves incidents) plus recover/base-freshness re-keying onto claims — an intelligence-bound invariant gating opus at the contract-shaped xhigh band.
